reviews.comment:
No entré, tampoco vi precios pero tiene restaurante con tenedor libre se veía de afuera muy completo. Creo que solo habré viernes, sábado y domingo mediodía. Ante la duda llamen

(Translated by Google)
I didn't go in, nor did I see the prices, but it has an all-you-can-eat restaurant that looked very complete from the outside. I think it's only open Friday, Saturday, and Sunday at lunchtime. If you have any doubts, call.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqbkotdEtREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Excelente el plato del día!!! Bifes a la criolla con papas fritas! Sin dudas cuando pase x ahí, haré la parada nuevamente! Y sobre todo económico!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent dish of the day!!! Creole steaks with fries! Without a doubt when I pass there, I will make the stop again! And above all economical!
